title: Data for: A staged whole-blood transcriptomic framework identifies and validates a compact myeloid-lymphoid activity score in systemic lupus erythematosus
author: Zhang, Chuanwei
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: <p>This repository contains the minimum sufficient dataset necessary to interpret, verify, and extend the research presented in our manuscript regarding the staged whole-blood transcriptomic framework and the compact myeloid-lymphoid activity score in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE).</p> <p><strong>Contents include:</strong></p> <ul>   <li>Processed cohort-level expression matrices from public GEO datasets.</li>   <li>Sample annotation tables and cohort manifests.</li>   <li>BloodGen3 aggregate-level score and z-score matrices.</li>   <li>Final definitions and alignment information for the pre6-any and pre6-balanced panels.</li>   <li>De-identified local PBMC validation data (qPCR, flow cytometry, and correlation matrices). Raw participant-level clinical data that cannot be fully anonymized are excluded to protect patient privacy.</li>   <li>Source data underlying Figures 2-4 and Supplementary Figure S1.</li> </ul>
steps_raw: <p>This repository contains the minimum sufficient dataset necessary to interpret, verify, and extend the research presented in our manuscript regarding the staged whole-blood transcriptomic framework and the compact myeloid-lymphoid activity score in systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE).</p> <p><strong>Contents include:</strong></p> <ul>   <li>Processed cohort-level expression matrices from public GEO datasets.</li>   <li>Sample annotation tables and cohort manifests.</li>   <li>BloodGen3 aggregate-level score and z-score matrices.</li>   <li>Final definitions and alignment information for the pre6-any and pre6-balanced panels.</li>   <li>De-identified local PBMC validation data (qPCR, flow cytometry, and correlation matrices). Raw participant-level clinical data that cannot be fully anonymized are excluded to protect patient privacy.</li>   <li>Source data underlying Figures 2-4 and Supplementary Figure S1.</li> </ul>
